taxes.description: Consumption tax on goods and services.

taxes.name: Corporate Tax (Total)

taxes.description: Additional 22% basic tax applies to net income.

taxes.name: Corporate Tax

taxes.name: Value Added Tax (VAT)

taxes.name: Value Added Tax (VAT)

taxes.name: Value Added Tax (VAT)

taxes.name: Income Tax (ISR)
taxes.description: Simplified brackets based on 2026 projections.

taxes.description: Transition phase (0.9% CBS + 0.1% IBS) for 2026.

taxes.description: Progressive rates based on net taxable income.
